message:
fix(evidence-sink): add 50 MiB size cap to prevent unbounded disk growth

The evidence sink wrote JSONL lines with no size limit. When the TUI was
in a broken state (e.g. blank screen on Windows), the spin loop could
produce ~300 MB/s of evidence, filling the disk within hours.

Add a configurable `max_bytes` field (default 50 MiB) to
EvidenceSinkConfig. Once the cap is reached, further writes are silently
dropped. The existing file size is counted on open so restarts do not
reset the budget.

Fixes coding_agent_session_search#108.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
